name: Italian Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix vinegar, 2 tablespoons Worcestershire sauce, 1 tablespoon oregano, and minced garlic.
2. Pour the mixture over the seasoned meat and diced onion. Cover lightly.
3. Roast at 350 degrees for 3 hours or until done. Slice when cool.
4. In a separate bowl, combine sauce ingredients: bring to boil, then cool for 10 minutes.
5. Add sliced beef to the cooled sauce.
6. Serve on poorboy buns. May be refrigerated for 2 to 3 weeks. Makes 10 to 16 servings.
